title: 6 top answer engine optimization benefits for growth and enterprise marketers
description: The AEO benefits that matter most to marketing leaders have shifted from theoretical to measurable. As more buyers discover brands through AI tools like ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, and Perplexity, the teams investing in AEO now are seeing real returns in conversions and long-term authority.

title: Agentforce needed a content layer, so Salesforce is buying Contentful
description:
Salesforce wants enterprises to drop static, channel-specific content in favor of 1:1 experiences at scale. So it went shopping. 
The post Agentforce needed a content layer, so Salesforce is buying Contentful appeared first on MarTech.

title: Retail marketers are at a crossroads — here’s how they can adapt
description: Justin Jefferson, vp, strategy and insight, Keen Decision Systems Retail marketers are navigating a marketing landscape defined by consolidation and heightened accountability. As retail media networks evolve beyond the initial gold rush, advertisers’ focus has shifted from merely having a presence to proving performance.  Likewise, with ad budgets under intense scrutiny, marketing success now requires […]

title: Why retailers like Target and Aerie are moving beyond straight affiliate deals with creators
description: Creator programs are changing as retailers like Target and Aerie realize they require a multifaceted approach that doesn't just rely on affiliate links.

title: Codex is becoming a productivity tool for everyone
description: The Next Era of Knowledge Work report explores how Codex is transforming productivity through AI-powered research, data analysis, workflow automation, and content creation.

title: Target has alienated Black-owned brands,  founders say, as some startups vanish from its shelves
description:
Target's relationship with Black founders is under a microscope, as the retailer mounts a comeback. 
Modern Retail spoke with several Black founders who refuse to work with Target again, or whose products have been pulled from the shelves over the last few years. Some cited the company's decision to pull back on certain DEI programs last year as a source of lingering frustration.

title: FAQs for Google’s ‘Preferred Sources’
description:
Websites flagged as preferred sources see increased visibility in AI answers, more returning visitors, and likely greater trust from Google.
The post FAQs for Google’s ‘Preferred Sources’ appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.

title: A new app, The Mall, is building a universal feed for online shopping
description: The Mall lets shoppers build a personalized feed of brands, track sales and drops, and discover products across thousands of retailers.

title: AI search behavior: What it means for your marketing strategy in 2026
description: AI search behavior may be causing a dip in your traffic, but it’s also sending higher-quality leads your way. For marketers, that second part is a massive win. AI search was the number one predictor of purchase intent for CRM software buyers, according to HubSpot’s State of AEO 2026 report. And there are more findings from the report that every go-to-market team needs to know.

title: NBCU points to premium video’s broad value as social marketing rises
description: The broadcaster and partner Gain Theory detailed how premium video can boost the middle funnel — and what’s lost in its absence.

title: Café Bustelo turns Latin culture into temporary tattoos ahead of World Cup
description: The J.M. Smucker brand’s “Game Face” campaign taps into the iconography of tournament heavyweights Argentina, Brazil, Colombia and Mexico.

title: Hyundai’s CMO on how to make the most of an official World Cup sponsorship
description: The automaker’s U.S. marketing campaign around the tournament, “Next Starts Now,” spans TV ads, social media, experiential activations and more.

title: Consumers like AI content until they know it’s AI
description:
Consumers often prefer AI-generated content when it is unlabeled, but trust drops sharply once they learn AI created it.
The post Consumers like AI content until they know it’s AI appeared first on MarTech.

title: How to balance data control and real-time personalization
description:
Warehouse native CDPs promise cleaner data, but marketers need new strategies to deliver fast, relevant experiences.
The post How to balance data control and real-time personalization appeared first on MarTech.
